Confirmed as Jill Ramirez, President/CEO and co-founder of the Latino HealthCare Forum (LHCF, 6601 Felix Ave, Austin TX 78741) — the employer string 'LHCF' plus occupation 'CEO' match exactly. NOTE: the record's zip 79745 is Kermit, TX (Winkler County) and conflicts with the 'Austin, TX' location — almost certainly a data-entry error for an Austin 787xx zip; identity is nonetheless confirmed by the employer/occupation match. No Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found. These are charges, not convictions, and the disposition of her case is not established by the sources reviewed — recorded here as an unresolved allegation, and no affiliation is derived from it.
